label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won a messy sprint finish by a third of a wheel over teammate GANNA Filippo after EVENEPOEL Remco banked bonus seconds at the intermediate sprint.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco targeted intermediate sprint bonuses on flat stage despite 6-second lead, revealing obsessive time-banking ahead of summit finishes.
GANNA Filippo led out teammate GROVES Kaden center-road positioning but nearly won himself, exposing dual-option sprint tactics vulnerability.
SEPÚLVEDA Eduardo attacked categorized climb solo 70km+ from finish purely for KOM points, showing breakaway riders prioritizing jersey over stage.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: actively hunted intermediate sprint bonuses despite comfortable GC lead, showing confidence and legs before Javalambre
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: won by margins tight enough to require photo finish, demonstrates sprint form and team coordination peaking
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: nearly won stage while leading out GROVES, revealing unexpectedly sharp finishing speed beyond time trial power
rider_signals.VAN GESTEL Dries: positive: podium finish as late-arriving fast finisher suggests top-end speed rivals dedicated sprinters
rider_signals.SEPÚLVEDA Eduardo: neutral: solo KOM hunt extended jersey lead but abandoned breakaway companion FAGUNDEZ, prioritizing classification over stage hunting
